labels.name: trust_score_batch_compare
labels.description:
Use this when you need to compare the trustworthiness of multiple domains, URLs, or wallets and pick the safest option. Accepts 2-5 targets and returns trust scores for all, sorted from most to least trusted.

Returns: { mostTrusted: "...", leastTrusted: "...", results: [{ compositeScore, grade, ver

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: trust_score_evaluate, trust_score_batch_compare · Private data: trust_score_evaluate, trust_score_batch_compare · Public sink: trust_score_evaluate.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: trust_score_evaluate, trust_score_batch_compare · Private data: trust_score_evaluate, trust_score_batch_compare · Public sink: trust_score_evaluate

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
